title: Senior Software Engineer - Netmeds - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Netmeds - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
